data.title: Avangrid named “Best Place to Work for Disability Inclusion” in 2025 Disability Index by Disability:IN. Top scorer in fostering inclusive environment for all employees.
data.description: Avangrid, Inc., a prominent energy company under the Iberdrola Group, has been acknowledged as the "Best Place to Work for Disability Inclusion" in the 2025 Disability Index® by Disability:IN, a renowned nonprofit advocating for business disability inclusion. Avangrid received a high score on the Index, highlighting its dedication to supporting disability inclusion and creating an empowering environment for all employees. This recognition solidifies Avangrid's commitment to diversity and inclusion efforts within the company.

data.title: UK-based BAY Miner launches app turning smartphones into Bitcoin miners, democratizing mining. Powered by renewable energy, app simplifies process.
data.description: BAY Miner, a UK-based blockchain company, has launched a mobile application that allows any modern smartphone to mine Bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies through cloud-based mining. This eliminates the need for traditional mining hardware, high power consumption, and complex setups, making cryptocurrency mining accessible to all. The app, designed for mass adoption, offers a secure, automated, and eco-efficient way to mine cryptocurrencies. Users can lease professional-grade mining power from energy-efficient data centers powered by renewable energy, managed by blockchain experts. The mobile interface allows users to select mining plans, monitor performance, and withdraw earnings easily. This innovation revolutionizes cryptocurrency mining by democratizing access and promoting sustainability.

data.title: Dow Jones drops before inflation survey; Netflix stock sells off; Robinhood, Tesla rally.
data.description: On Friday, the Dow Jones index experienced a decrease as investors anticipated important inflation data. Netflix shares were also negatively impacted by earnings. Today in the stock market, with live coverage reporting the details, the Dow Jones fell before the release of the inflation survey. Meanwhile, Robinhood and Tesla saw gains amidst the overall market movement. This development was covered in detail by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: BVI Court rules in favor of Gerald Group as owner of Soremi Mine after dispute with CNG; CNG found in contempt.
data.description: On July 18, 2025, it was reported that a dispute between Global Mining Development L.P., a subsidiary of Gerald Group, and China National Gold Hong Kong Limited (CNG), a subsidiary of China National Gold Group, has been ongoing. Global is fully owned by Gerald Group while CNG is a wholly owned subsidiary of China National Gold Group. This conflict has been a focus of attention for quite some time.

data.title: SLB reports Q2 2025 results, revenue at $8.55B, up 6%. Adjusted EPS at 74 cents. North America revenue up 1%, international revenue down 8%.
data.description: Schlumberger N.V. (NYSE: SLB) saw a rise in its shares following the release of its second-quarter 2025 results. Revenue for the quarter decreased by 6% year-over-year to $8.55 billion, surpassing the projected $8.47 billion. Adjusted earnings per share also fell by 13% to 74 cents, meeting analysts' predictions. In North America, revenue increased by 1% to $1.66 billion, driven by growth in data center infrastructure but offset by weaker Asset Performance Solutions (APS) revenue and a decline in U.S. land drilling activity. International revenue went down by 8% to $6.85 billion, with Latin America recording a 14% decrease due to reduced drilling in Mexico, although this was partially balanced by robust unconventional stimulation activity in Argentina.

data.title: Hire Salesforce Developers from Hyperlink InfoSystem for Customized CRM Solutions to Drive Business Growth. Leading CRM platform.
data.description: On July 18, 2025, in cities like New York and Los Angeles, Salesforce has become the top choice for businesses globally looking to enhance customer experience and streamline operations with data-driven solutions. The platform stands out as a leader in CRM, aiding in managing customer interactions, sales funnels, and overall business processes. This significant shift highlights the increasing importance of leveraging technology to excel in today's competitive market.

data.title: Sharing Hearts Fund awards grants to 5 Stark County families via Liberty HealthShare®, in collaboration with Canton Repository.
data.description: In Canton, Ohio on July 18, 2025, the Sharing Hearts Fund for Pediatric Wellness, a charitable organization affiliated with Liberty HealthShare®, and partnered with the Canton Repository, disclosed their initial disbursements to assist five Stark County families. The Sharing Hearts Fund for Pediatric Wellness aims to support the needs of children in the community.

data.title: Canadian host Simon explores advanced manufacturing at 3rd CISCE, showcasing acceleration of global supply chains.
data.description: On July 18, 2025, in Beijing, the 3rd China International Supply Chain Expo (CISCE) featured Canadian host Simon delving into the advanced manufacturing zone. This showcased the acceleration of global supply chains.
